title: ITALY enforcement action against Depac Società Cooperativa Sociale a r.l. (15,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 15,000 on Depac Società Cooperativa Sociale a r.l. The controller used two fingerprint devices to track the arrival and departure times of six employees working for a public contractor. The controller had no legal basis for this processing. Legal basis:...
